rule: The default review surface alternates between the two combined learner-facing faces: hanzi and reading.
notes: Hanzi cards should display simplified as primary, with the traditional form in parentheses when it differs.
Reading cards should display pinyin as primary, with zhuyin in parentheses when it differs, followed by the saved English definitions.
Prompt shows one face, and reveal shows both faces together.
Variation generators should avoid same-layer cards.
